findings.description: Table property names from the first column of the data model tables are missing from hints: `メールテンプレートID` and `言語` (from HTMLメール用代替テキストテンプレートテーブル). `代替テキスト` also appears in both tables but is absent from hints.
findings.source_evidence: HTMLメール用代替テキストテンプレートテーブルの定義列: メールテンプレートID (PK), 言語 (PK), 代替テキスト

findings.description: `HtmlMailTable` is a PascalCase class name used in the s8 code example (`HtmlMailTable htmlTable = SystemRepository.get("htmlMailTable")`) but is absent from s8 hints.

`TemplateMailContext` is a PascalCase class name explicitly mentioned in the s9 source text (`TemplateMailContext#setReplaceKeyValue`) and referenced in the code via `super.setReplaceKeyValue`, but is absent from s9 hints.
findings.source_evidence: PJにてTemplateHtmlMailContextを修正し、TemplateMailContext#setReplaceKeyValueを呼び出すAPIを追加すること
